title: taraxacum longicuspis
intro: Taraxacum longicuspis is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate digestive issues, boost the immune system, and reduce the risk of certain cancers, among other health benefits. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Taraxacum longicuspis are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
